name: Fossil Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>融</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フォッシル・フュージョン
desc: Fusion Summon 1 "Fossil" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials mentioned on it from any GYs (except for materials with a specific GY requirement listed). If you banished monsters from both GYs, neither player can target that Special Summoned monster with monster effects. If a face-up "Fossil" Fusion Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card from the GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Fossil Fusion" once per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 "Fossil" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials mentioned on it from any GYs (except for materials with a specific GY requirement listed). If you banished monsters from both GYs, neither player can target that Special Summoned monster with monster effects. If a face-up "Fossil" Fusion Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card from the GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Fossil Fusion" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the opponent's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
